svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(179, 179, 179), rgb(83, 83, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 548px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: monospace; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
